queries.question: What are the cuisine types common to all schools?
queries.sql: SELECT Cuisine_Types.type  from Culinary_Schools_Cuisine_Types join Cuisine_Types on Culinary_Schools_Cuisine_Types.cuisine_type_id = Cuisine_Types.cuisine_id join Culinary_Schools on Culinary_Schools_Cuisine_Types.culinary_school_id = Culinary_Schools.id   GROUP BY Culinary_Schools_Cuisine_Types.cuisine_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Culinary_Schools_Cuisine_Types.culinary_school_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Culinary_Schools)

queries.question: For each of the schools, what cuisine types are there?
queries.sql: select culinary_schools.name , cuisine_types.type from Culinary_Schools_Cuisine_Types join Cuisine_Types on Culinary_Schools_Cuisine_Types.cuisine_type_id = Cuisine_Types.cuisine_id join Culinary_Schools on Culinary_Schools_Cuisine_Types.culinary_school_id = Culinary_Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?culinary_schools_cuisine_types a :Culinary_Schools_Cuisine_Types .
  ?cuisine_types a :Cuisine_Types .
  ?culinary_schools_cuisine_types p:hasCuisine_Types ?cuisine_types .
  ?culinary_schools a :Culinary_Schools .
  ?culinary_schools_cuisine_types p:hasCulinary_Schools ?culinary_schools .
  ?culinary_schools p:name ?name .
  ?cuisine_types p:type ?type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the cuisine types available for every one of the culinary schools?
